services: roof repair, full roof replacement, storm and hail damage, and free inspections; we work with insurance claims
service_area: the greater metro area and surrounding counties, about a 40-mile radius
hours: 7am-6pm Monday through Saturday, with priority response after storms
pricing_notes: inspections are free; repairs and replacements are quoted after the inspection; financing is available on full replacements; never quote a firm roof price over the phone
booking_notes: qualify whether it is storm or leak damage versus a planned replacement, and whether it is an insurance claim or cash; then book the free inspection by collecting name, address, and a preferred day and time window
emergency_examples: an active leak, storm or hail damage, or missing shingles after high winds
